subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter was received and, praise be to God, its contents bore testimony to the unity and oneness of the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه رسید الحمد لله معانی دلیل بر وحدت و یگانگی احباء بود
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
